title: Biofuel Powers Ferry Freight Operational the Port of Poole
content: The freight vessel MN Pelican, a roll-on/roll-off vessel chartered by Brittany Ferries from Maritime Nantaise to operate between Poole and Bilbao, is now regularly bunkering B25 marine biofuel at the Port of Poole. Since February 2025, over 1.5 million litres of B25 have been delivered at Poole by Whitaker Tankers in support of Pelicanâ€™s Channel crossings.
author: Analysts Account
